label: capability search • method • abstain on chit-chat
notes: Symmetric with `capability_search.abstain-greeting` on the tools lane. FIXED + PROMOTED 2026-06-19 (W3): RRF saturation (max ≈ 0.0328 with k=60) capped the abstain-vs-recall gap to ~0.001, so no fused/cosine floor could separate this from real recall. The resolution is the pre-RRF query-intent gate (`CapabilityQueryIntent.isConversationalAbstain`), which short-circuits 'thanks, that's perfect' before any lane runs — methods lane returns empty, `maxAccepted=0` holds. Now enforced in recall_floors.json.
